ddls:
CREATE TABLE "resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the resource */,
  "grade_level" TEXT /* Grade level the resource is intended for */,
  "guided_reading_level" TEXT /* Guided reading level of the resource */,
  "lexile" TEXT /* Lexile score of the resource */,
  "spanish_edl" TEXT /* Spanish equivalent developmental level (EDL) */,
  "page_count" INTEGER /* Number of pages in the resource */,
  "word_count" INTEGER /* Word count of the resource */,
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* Publisher ID for the resource */,
  "subject_area" INTEGER /* Subject area of the resource */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of the resource (digital/physical) */,
  "keywords" TEXT /* Keywords for the resource */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the resource */,
  "copyright_info" TEXT /* Copyright information and licensing details */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resources_spanish_edl FOREIGN KEY ("spanish_edl") REFERENCES spanish_edls ("edl_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resources_grade_level FOREIGN KEY ("grade_level") REFERENCES grades ("grade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resources_lexile FOREIGN KEY ("lexile") REFERENCES lexiles ("lexile_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resources_publisher_id FOREIGN KEY ("publisher_id") REFERENCES publishers ("publisher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resources_guided_reading_level FOREIGN KEY ("guided_reading_level") REFERENCES guided_reading_levels ("level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grades" (
  "grade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grade level */,
  "grade_name" TEXT /* Name of the grade level (e.g., Kindergarten, Grade 1) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the grade level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grade_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "guided_reading_levels" (
  "level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each guided reading level */,
  "level_name" TEXT /* Name of the guided reading level (e.g., A - D, E - J) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the reading difficulty for the level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lexiles" (
  "lexile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lexile score */,
  "lexile_score" TEXT /* Lexile score of the resource */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the reading difficulty for the lexile score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lexile_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "spanish_edls" (
  "edl_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Spanish EDL score */,
  "edl_score" TEXT /* Spanish EDL score of the resource */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the reading difficulty for the Spanish EDL score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("edl_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publishers" (
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publisher */,
  "publisher_name" TEXT /* Name of the publisher */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the publisher */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the publisher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publisher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subjects" (
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subject */,
  "subject_name" TEXT /* Name of the subject */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the subject */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subject_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_subjects" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the resource */,
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the subject */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id", "subject_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "usage_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage event */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource being used */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user using the resource */,
  "usage_date" TEXT /* Date when the resource was used */,
  "usage_type" TEXT /* Type of usage (e.g., viewed, printed) */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Session ID to link multiple usage logs */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the usage in seconds */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., page turn, video play) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_usage_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_usage_logs_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., teacher, administrator) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the user belongs to */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report's content */,
  "generation_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "data" TEXT /* JSON data containing the report's content */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., usage, analytics) */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used to generate the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)
